headline: Unbeaten Tennessee brings defensive mettle to Columbus
subhead: Ohio State must prove last week's loss to Texas was a blip, not a warning sign.

xFactor.why: Ohio State's quarterback will need to manage pressure and limit mistakes against a Tennessee defense that just held Penn State to 20 points in a ranked matchup.

keyMatchup: Tennessee's ability to generate interior pressure on Ohio State's offensive line against the Buckeyes' need to establish early rhythm and avoid second-and-long situations.
body: Tennessee arrives 2-0 with a credential-building win over Penn State, a team that pushed them but ultimately couldn't sustain offensive consistency. Ohio State's 29-15 loss to Texas exposed vulnerabilities in pass coverage and situational discipline, two areas Tennessee's defense has clearly mastered through two weeks. The Volunteers have won close, which suggests composure and execution when the moment tightens.

Ohio State's talent on offense remains undeniable, but the Buckeyes will face an away crowd and a defense that doesn't beat itself. Tennessee's margin in this matchup stems not from a massive schematic advantage but from already having solved the puzzle of winning on the road against top talent, while Ohio State is searching for answers after a setback. Home field in Knoxville would favor the Vols; playing in Columbus keeps it competitive.
